jd_text: IT & Systems Director - on behalf of a client LOCATION : DIFC, Dubai SALARY : Depending on experience ABOUT US We are launching a brand-new and exclusive members' club, located in the heart of Dubai, that offers a private world of unparalleled connections. Representing a new pinnacle of sophistication and elegance in the region, the club sets itself apart as a carefully curated membership offering, fusing Emirati cultural nuance with timeless heritage hospitality. We are committed to providing exceptional service and creating unforgettable experiences for our distinguished members. ROLE OVERVEW The IT & Systems Director holds executive responsibility for the club’s technology ecosystem, ensuring all digital platforms, infrastructure and operational systems function as a secure, resilient and fully integrated environment. This includes CRM, POS, finance systems, member-facing platforms, access control and data governance. Reporting to the Club General Manager, the role ensures technology supports the full member lifecycle while enabling efficient operations and high service standards across the club. The IT & Systems Director oversees systems procurement, integration and vendor management, ensuring platforms operate as a coherent and scalable architecture aligned with the club’s membership strategy, privacy standards and long-term growth. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES System Strategy & Architecture Own the end-to-end systems architecture, with Salesforce as the core CRM and system of record . Define how all digital and operational systems connect, interact and evolve over time. Ensure technology supports the full member lifecycle, from first introduction to long-term retention. Establish clear principles for privacy, data governance, security and system ownership across the stack. Ensure infrastructure resilience, cybersecurity standards and operational continuity across all systems. Salesforce & Core Platform Ownership Lead the i n-house implementation, configuration and ongoing ownership of Salesforce . Design Salesforce architecture to support: Prospecting, referrals and provenance tracking, Applications, committee workflows and approvals, KYC, onboarding and founder engagement, Member engagement, usage and retention. Act as internal product owner, translating operational and commercial needs into Salesforce delivery. Configure objects, workflows, automations, dashboards and reporting aligned to the approved membership operating model. Systems Integration & Delivery Oversee integration of Salesforce with all core systems, including: Website and application flows, Member app and portal, POS, reservations and table management, Access control and identity systems, Payments and finance. Ensure integrations are stable, well-documented and future-proofed. Minimise dependency on external vendors by retaining system knowledge in-house. Selectively manage specialist external partners where required, with clear accountability and quality control. Ensure alignment between CRM, POS, finance and operational systems to maintain a unified data environment. Manage technology vendors and implementation partners, ensuring performance, accountability and knowledge retention in-house. Pre-opening Implementation Lead delivery of a fully integrated systems environment ready for soft opening. Ensure all systems are tested end-to-end against real operational scenarios. Align systems delivery tightly with the pre-opening critical path. Enable founder onboarding, early bookings and pre-opening engagement through digital channels. Live Operations & Optimisation Own systems performance once the club is live, ensuring reliability, data quality and operational clarity. Continually optimise systems based on member behaviour, staff feedback and operational learnings. Support Membership, Brand, Operations and Finance teams with insight, reporting and system-driven decision-making. Introduce phased enhancements to automation, personalisation and intelligence over time. Build internal documentation, training and handover processes to ensure long-term resilience. SALESFORCE EXPERIENCE Please note, this role requires deep Salesforce experience and applications without this will not be considered. While formal certification is not a substitute for real-world delivery, the successful candidate is expected to demonstrate strong Salesforce platform expertise, supported by relevant credentials or equivalent hands-on experience. Candidates should have personally led Salesforce delivery within complex, live operational environments. REQUIREMENTS Must be currently based in Dubai or available to relocate to Dubai for a full-time role. 10+ experience in senior IT, systems or digital leadership roles within hospitality, private clubs, luxury environments or comparable service-led organisations. Deep, hands-on experience owning Salesforce implementations in-house, from architecture and configuration through to live operation and optimisation. Demonstrated ability to operate Salesforce as a system of record, integrated across multiple platforms (apps, POS, reservations, access, payments and reporting). Strong understanding of Salesforce data models, security architecture, permissions and governance, particularly in privacy-led environments. Strong understanding of IT infrastructure, cybersecurity standards and enterprise system governance. Experience supporting new openings or pre-opening phases within hospitality, lifestyle or membership-led businesses. Ability to translate complex operational, commercial and cultural requirements into coherent systems delivery. Comfortable operating at executive level while remaining close to delivery detail. High levels of discretion, judgement and accountability. Strong cultural intelligence and understanding of the UAE market. WHAT WE OFFER A competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package. Access to exclusive events and high-level networking opportunities. The opportunity to be part of one of Dubai’s most exclusive and prestigious private members’ clubs. The opportunity to make a lasting impact by shaping the club’s identity, culture, and operational excellence at the highest level.
